CustomField.description: Opportunity-level discount approval lifecycle (Not Required / Pending / Approved / Rejected). Automation-only: OpportunityTriggerHandler escalates to Pending when the Opp discount-approval criteria hold (Strategic Logo reason, or any discount reason with Amount >= 100k) and the Northstar Discount Approval process records the decision. Gated by the Discount_Approval_Required_For_Close validation rule so a discounted Opp can't close won without Deal Desk sign-off.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Opportunity discount approval lifecycle. Maintained by the Opportunity trigger and the discount approval process.
CustomField.label: Discount Approval Status
